name: Greed
description:
Ohhhh look at that tix under that conveniently placed box on top of a stick! Don’t you want that tix? Ohh it’s so tempting! Go grab it! The box totally isn’t gonna fall on you!

Builderman isn’t here btw. Because I didn’t feel like adding him

Greed voted most kissable demo 3 blocktales boss by me. Also voted third most kissable block tales boss to date by me again (Griefer is number one because he’s my husband)

Chat now that it’s confirmed Griefer is not a minor I have something to admit… I like frozenfang (Griefer x Cruel King) please don’t set me on fire

I updated my strawpage. Mostly added more stupid shit
